raw_consumer_statement:
This complaint is a continuum of complaint number : XXXX. 

I contacted American Express on XX/XX/2023 in regards to case number XXXX. The statement cycle in which the payment was posted was from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX ( attached ). In reviewing my current statement, I am unable to locate where American Express provisionally credited me the amount of the disputed item. The dispute does not appear deducted from the XXXX or current statement. In all, it appears that American Express has held me responsible for the amount in dispute. 

This action appears to be a potential violation of Truth-in-Lending. Under Truth-in-Lending, the consumer has the right to withhold the disputed amount, and collection is prohibited. I am requesting a written response from American Express as to why it potentially appears I was held responsible for a disputed amount and if not, where the provisional credit is detailed. As of XX/XX/2023, there has been no resolution of the charge or notice provided.
